title: ageratina neohintoniorum
intro: Ageratina neohintoniorum, also known as Mexican mint or False Dragonhead, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ageratina neohintoniorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
